name: freeCulture
notification: We have discovered cultural artifacts in the ruins!
uniques: Gain [25] [Culture] <(modified by game speed)> <after turn number [15]>

notification: We have found survivors in the ruins! Population added to [cityName].

notification: We have found a stash of [goldAmount] Gold in the ruins!

notification: We have discovered the lost technology of [techName] in the ruins!
uniques: [1] free random researchable Tech(s) from the [Ancient era]

notification: Our unit finds advanced weaponry hidden in the ruins!
uniques: [This Unit] upgrades for free including special upgrades

notification: We have found a crudely-drawn map in the ruins!

uniques: Gain [25] [Faith] <(modified by game speed)> <after turn number [15]>

notification: We have discovered cultural signs in the ruins! (+20 culture)

notification: We have discovered cultural artifacts in the ruins! (+50 culture)

notification: Captured villagers share the secrets of their well-ordered society! (+[cultureAmount] culture)

notification: We have discovered a scripture of policy idea, we can now try adopting it!

notification: We have discovered a portion of advanced technology! (+50 science)

notification: We have successfully taken control of the stolen technology! (+[scienceAmount] science)

notification: We have discovered the lost technology of [techName] in the ruins!

notification: Small amount of money buried underground! (+50 gold)

notification: A pocket of gold buried underground! (+100 gold)

notification: Jackpot! (+1000 gold)

notification: We have found holy symbols in the ruins, giving us a deeper understanding of religion! (+[faithAmount] Faith)
uniques: Gain enough Faith for a Pantheon

name: a praying priest
notification: A dying priest prays for you! (+[faithAmount] faith)

notification: An oracle foresees your future! (+[faithAmount] faith)

name: survivors (adds population to a city)
notification: We have found survivors in the ruins! Population added to [cityName].

name: accepted immigrants (adds 3 population to a city)
notification: A family of immigrants saved in the ruins! Population added to [cityName].

notification: A [Worker] has joined us!

name: squatters wishing to settle under your rule
notification: A [Settler] has joined us!

notification: We have found a crudely-drawn map in the ruins!

name: find a well-drawn map

notification: A full expedition joins us from the ruins!
